title: Seeds, Origins, Paths, Query Space, Budgets, and Stop Policy · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed crawl review reconstructs seeds, origins, paths, query space, budgets, and stop policy from authorization, revision, seed, URL key, response identity, robots decision, parse record, extraction provenance, frontier event, report row, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded crawl-scope policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record each seed URL, stakeholder, purpose, authorization source, expected content class, and crawl revision.
Define allowed schemes, normalized hosts, ports, subdomains, redirects, and cross-origin resources with deny-by-default rules.
Express permitted paths, methods, query keys, values, pagination, fragments, and content types as testable admission rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

stimulus.title: Stop And Contact Policy case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review site-quality team handles case 1503 during a clean package and recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate seed identity, origin and path admission, resource budgets, and automatic and manual stop policy; automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance; then change a robots, canonical, indexing, structured-data, or accessibility signal and retain the conflict. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. lines.label: risk
lines.text: A crawler should keep retrying until it eventually completes.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define automatic stop signals, manual kill paths, owner contact, partial-output handling, cleanup, and restart authorization. Artifact under review: bounded crawl-scope policy.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner authorization, revision, URL and robots policy, response budgets, parser and selector limits, provenance, frontier and concurrency evidence, changed fixtures, privacy, security, accessibility, stop, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as crawler proof. This does not satisfy Stop And Contact Policy for bounded crawl-scope policy.
The record names the assumption, applies Stop And Contact Policy, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Stop And Contact Policy record says bounded crawl-scope policy looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Stop And Contact Policy.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Define automatic stop signals, manual kill paths, owner contact, partial-output handling, cleanup, and restart authorization.
